title: Athletic Trainer Professional Development Program
doc_html:
NOTE: §3721 effective upon appropriation of monies to fund the implementation of the provisions of Acts 2022, No. 495.

CHAPTER 31. ATHLETIC TRAINER PROFESSIONAL

DEVELOPMENT PROGRAM

§3721. Athletic Trainer Professional Development Program

            The Athletic Trainer Professional Development Program is hereby created in the state Department of Education. The program is established to meet the projected shortage of certified athletic trainers employed at high schools in rural areas of the state by increasing the number of certified athletic trainers through a loan repayment program.

            Acts 2022, No. 495, §1, see Act.

CHAPTER 31.  ATHLETIC TRAINER PROFESSIONAL
DEVELOPMENT PROGRAM
§3721.  Athletic Trainer Professional Development Program
The Athletic Trainer Professional Development Program is hereby created in the
state Department of Education.  The program is established to meet the projected shortage
of certified athletic trainers employed at high schools in rural areas of the state by
increasing the number of certified athletic trainers through a loan repayment program.
Acts 2022, No. 495, §1, see Act.
